Vendored `libbox.aar` for the embedded sing-box Android runtime.

Current product status:

- bundled in the repository
- available as a comparison runtime lane
- not the active runtime for the `v0.1.x` release line

Source:

- repository: `https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box`
- commit: `9675b0902af12f1acaa0d677f102332472c1b06c`
- artifact build date: `2026-04-12`

Notes:

- the AAR was built locally from the pinned upstream source
- it is consumed only by `:vpnservice`
- the upstream license is included in [LICENSE](/C:/src/tunguska/third_party/libbox/LICENSE)
